title: EVA D TYPE
wikitext:
[]: EVA D TYPE             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Sun May 25, 2008 5:22 pm ^ Well, This is Cospa's latest on Pre-order Evangelion T-shirts design ... I guess they're trying to say that the New Eva unit will be called " D type " what ya'll think ?

[]:             Quote Post by Kurochi » Sun May 25, 2008 5:27 pm Isn't D type equipment just equipment that can withstand various elements that a normal eva can't, but in doing so they have less mobility? Example: Eva-02 when going into the Volcano had D-type equipment to fight sandalphon. I think it's a nice shirt, don't know if I would want to wear D-type equipment though...

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun May 25, 2008 6:08 pm I could imagine the jokes going around if a female Eva fan wore that shirt to a convention.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 04, 2008 8:37 am Does this have anything to do with the new movies, at all?
